response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document is fabricated: the EEOC has never issued guidance permitting age-cohort screening or creating ADEA safe harbors for filtering applicants by age range, which would be facially unlawful under the ADEA itself; no such "Technical Guidance 2025-03" or "Form EEOC-TG-2503" exists, and the content directly contradicts established ADEA law rather than interpreting it.
